calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming That Certain Personal Property Is An Asset Of The Trust
Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Darcy Wong for Wells Fargo Bank. Daun Stallons also present. Jeffrey Haight also present.

Ms. Wong stated that Probate Code 17200 and Probate Code 856 gives the Court the power and discretion to transfer property, that all interested parties supported the petition and that the Decedent intended the have the property go into the trust. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
